docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY COSDEL INTERNATIONAL CO INC AS TO DEFENDANT TUTTLE TOBY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
